caption: A screen recording displays a website for a "List Randomizer" from RANDOM.ORG. The page features a header with links such as "Home," "Games," and "Randombers," along with a warning that "We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain." To the left and right of the main content, a live chat stream shows messages from users "glowbg27" and "Nightbot," with Nightbot posting a link: "https://tbn.bz/NzkS8kS9". Below the chat, a webcam feed shows a man with a beard and dark hair wearing a dark shirt. In the center of the screen, a list of names is being randomized. While the initial list starts with names like "Jay Goins" and "Carl Hagedorn," the scene shifts to show a new randomized result where "Michael Loguercio" is now listed first. The footer of the page contains the text "CASEBREAKS.COM" and a copyright notice stating "© 1998-2023 RANDOM.ORG."
